title: Peter Rabbit Party Bag Sticker Bundle (18 Sheets) | Beatrix Potter | Official Licensed Product | Perfect for Children’s Parties, Party Bags or Stocking Fillers | Boys and Girls Stickers | Kids Age 3+
features: Licensed product; high quality Peter Rabbit stickers featuring all of your favourite Beatrix Potter characters. We use the best materials to ensure that our stickers are wonderfully detailed and coloured, and with a bright glossy finish

Party time; Includes a total of 18 sheets of stickers per pack! These compact sticker packs are designed for party bags and are great for children's parties, but are also great for special events as you get plenty of stickers per pack
Wonderful design; Eighteen identical sheets of paper stickers, all in fantastic colourful designs and wonderfully detailed

Learning and crafting; Perfect activity for little fingers and great for improving children's dexterity, coordination, and for encouraging craft play. Stickers can be used to decorate books or party bags, or for creating fun scenes and displays
Decoration; Stickers can also be used on books and tablets, pencil cases, bikes and helmets, toy boxes, and anything else you can think of
description: From the manufacturer Check out some others in our Peter Rabbit Range! OFFICIAL PRODUCT - Official high-quality Mega Sticker Pack, featuring all of your favourite The World of Peter Rabbit characters. BIG SELECTION - Three different sticker types - including a big glossy A4 sticker sheet, foiled sticker sheet, and a bag of individual stickers. Size - 29.7cm x 21cm Check out some others in our Peter Rabbit Range! HOME TEACHING - This official licensed reward chart is specially designed to help parents reward achievements such as reading and spelling, bath-time or potty training, eating their greens, or just good behavior during playtime. REWARDS WORK - Saying well done to your child is one of the best ways to encourage good behaviour, and what better way to do it with some wonderful stickers SPARKLY STICKERS - This reward chart is glossy and the detailed foiled stickers have a range of different designs, also the chart can be wiped clean if need be. Size - 29.7cm x 42cm Check out some others in our Peter Rabbit Range! COLOURFUL DESIGN - Includes colourful backing card, or can be used to decorate books, pencil cases, phones, tablets, toy boxes, furniture, and anything else you can think of. Stickers are also removable if needed! GIFTS AND PRESENTS - Can be a birthday gift, Christmas present, or party bag filler. Whether it's a special occasion, a reward for good behaviour, or just a nice little gift, children love stickers! Size - 19.5cm x 9.5cm Check out some others in our Peter Rabbit Range! PARTY TIME! - Includes six sheets of stickers per pack. Small size to fit in party bags. These compact sticker packs are designed for party bags and children's parties, but can also be used for special events as you get six sheets of stickers per pack. DECORATION - Stickers can also be used on books and tablets, pencil cases, bikes and helmets, toy boxes, and anything else you can think of! Size - 12.5cm x 7.5cm Peter Rabbit Mega Pack Peter Rabbit Reward Chart Peter Rabbit Sparkly Foil Stickers Peter Rabbit Party Pack (Six Sheets) More from Paper Projects Reward Charts and Stickers Our Reward Charts are A3-sized, wipe-clean, and include a wide range of reusable sparkly foil stickers to help reward your children's little successes and achievements. Additional Paper Projects Rewards Stickers can be purchased, and both the included stickers and additional stickers can easily be removed from non-porous surfaces. Mega Sticker Packs Our Mega Packs include approximately 150 stickers, offering a wide range of different styles and designs. The Mega Packs include one A4 sheet of glossy stickers, one sheet of sparkly foil stickers, and several individual die-cut stickers. Assorted Sticker Packs Our Assortment Packs include the same sort of range as the Mega Pack, but in a more compact size. Each Assortment Pack includes one 19.5cm sheet of glossy stickers, one sheet of sparkly foil stickers, and several individual die-cut stickers. Party Packs - Six Sheets It's party time! Our Party Packs include six identical sheets of stickers, in a compact size to ensure they fit into party bags (12.5cm x 7.5cm). These stickers can be used as party bag fillers for any themed (or non-themed!) birthday party, as stocking fillers, or just as a nice gift. Bundles of three packs (18 sheets) are also available for each design.
